meaning: n.[希神]阿拉克尼(古传系Lydia之少女,与女神Athena竞赛织绣获胜,被点化为蜘蛛)
examples: Arachne filled her canvas with similar subjects, wonderfully well done, but strongly marking her presumption and impiety.
While her mother was busy cooking the simple meals for the family, or working in the fields, Arachne used to spin all day long.
When both pieces were finished, Arachne saw, to her surprise, that she had been beaten, for the goddess 'design was infinitely superior.
The role of a villainous spider-woman named Arachne was scaled back and the Green Goblin's role was enhanced.
Natalie Mendoza, who plays "spider goddess" Arachne, was hit in the head by a rope and suffered a concussion during the first performance on 28 November.
